description: The Construct Zita Parameters node creates ZitaParameters which are used make a reverberation sound effect parameter input object in the Awwdio system, for use in different reverberation sound effect methods like the one for Static Audio Clips.

fields.InDelay: The delay time before the reverb starts.
fields.Crossover: How much the reverb "crosses over" or fades within itself.
fields.RT60Low: RT60 refers to the Reverberation Time, which is the time it takes for the sound energy in a room to decay by 60 decibels after the sound source has stopped. (Low End)
fields.RT60Mid: RT60 refers to the Reverberation Time, which is the time it takes for the sound energy in a room to decay by 60 decibels after the sound source has stopped. (Mid End)
fields.HighFrequencyDamping: The high frequency dampening for the reverb.
fields.EQ1Frequency: The equalizer frequency (1) of the reverb.
fields.EQ1Level: The equalizer volume (1) of the reverb.
fields.EQ2Frequency: The equalizer frequency (2) of the reverb.
fields.EQ2Level: The equalizer volume (2) of the reverb.
fields.Mix: The amount of audio to mix in the reverb.
fields.Level: The overall level (or volume) of the reverb
